reasoning: The HIPAA control 164.308(a)(8) focuses on evaluation, which involves monitoring and auditing security practices. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring audit logging is enabled and configured to capture necessary metadata, using admission controllers to enforce security policies, and maintaining RBAC configurations to enforce least privilege. These checks align with the need for continuous evaluation and monitoring of security configurations.
title: 164_308_a_8: 164.308(a)(8) Evaluation
